step3.heading: Give it something to do
step3.description: Give your agent a small task to start with — a bug fix, a research question, writing a script.

step4.heading: Ready to launch
step4.description: Everything is set up. Launching now will create the starter task, wake the agent, and open the issue.

pathInstructionsModal.title: How to get a full path
pathInstructionsModal.description: Paste the absolute path (e.g. /Users/you/project) into the input field.
pathInstructionsModal.macStep1: Open Finder and navigate to the folder.
pathInstructionsModal.macStep3: Hold the Option (⌥) key — "Copy" changes to "Copy as Pathname".
pathInstructionsModal.macStep4: Click "Copy as Pathname", then paste here.
pathInstructionsModal.macTip: You can also open Terminal, type cd, drag the folder into the terminal window, and press Enter. Then type pwd to see the full path.
pathInstructionsModal.windowsStep1: Open File Explorer and navigate to the folder.
pathInstructionsModal.windowsStep2: Click in the address bar at the top — the full path will appear.
pathInstructionsModal.windowsStep3: Copy the path, then paste here.
pathInstructionsModal.windowsTip: Alternatively, hold Shift and right-click the folder, then select "Copy as path".
pathInstructionsModal.linuxStep1: Open a terminal and navigate to the directory with cd.
pathInstructionsModal.linuxStep2: Run pwd to print the full path.
pathInstructionsModal.linuxStep3: Copy the output and paste here.
pathInstructionsModal.linuxTip: In most file managers, Ctrl+L reveals the full path in the address bar.

issuesList.noIssuesMatch: No issues match the current filters or search.

agentConfigForm.name: Name
agentConfigForm.title: Title
agentConfigForm.capabilitiesPlaceholder: Describe what this agent can do...
agentConfigForm.promptTemplatePlaceholder: You are agent {{ agent.name }}. Your role is {{ agent.role }}...
agentConfigForm.promptTemplateWarning: Prompt template is replayed on every heartbeat. Keep it compact and dynamic to avoid recurring token cost and cache churn.
agentConfigForm.promptTemplateWarningCreate: Prompt template is replayed on every heartbeat. Prefer small task framing and variables like {{ context.* }} or {{ run.* }}; avoid repeating stable instructions here.
agentConfigForm.bootstrapPromptPlaceholder: Optional initial setup prompt for the first run
agentConfigForm.bootstrapPromptWarning: Bootstrap prompt is legacy and will be removed in a future release. Consider moving this content into the agent's prompt template or instructions file instead.
agentConfigForm.codexMinimalWarning: Codex may reject `minimal` thinking when search is enabled.
agentConfigForm.createSecretFromValue: Create secret from current plain value
agentConfigForm.sealTitle: Store value as secret and replace with reference
agentConfigForm.paperclipVarsNote: PAPERCLIP_* variables are injected automatically at runtime.

projectProperties.name: Name
projectProperties.codebaseHelpTooltip: Repo identifies the source of truth. Local folder is the default place agents write code.
projectProperties.legacyWorkspacesNote: Additional legacy workspace records exist on this project. Paperclip is using the primary workspace as the codebase view.
projectProperties.localPathError: Local folder must be a full absolute path.
projectProperties.repoUrlError: Repo must use a valid GitHub repo URL.
projectProperties.clearLocalFolderConfirm: Clear local folder from this workspace?
projectProperties.executionWorkspacesHelpTooltip: Project-owned defaults for isolated issue checkouts and execution workspace behavior.
projectProperties.enableIsolatedCheckoutsDescription: Let issues choose between the project's primary checkout and an isolated execution workspace.
projectProperties.newIssuesDefaultIsolated: New issues default to isolated checkout
projectProperties.newIssuesDefaultIsolatedDescription: If disabled, new issues stay on the project's primary checkout unless someone opts in.
projectProperties.provisionTeardownDescription: Provision runs inside the derived worktree before agent execution. Teardown is stored here for future cleanup flows.
projectProperties.archiveDescription: Archive this project to hide it from the sidebar and project selectors.
projectProperties.unarchiveDescription: Unarchive this project to restore it in the sidebar and project selectors.
